Services / Health Coverage Counseling

Health Coverage Counseling

If you don’t have insurance, or you have questions about your coverage options, the CMC team is here to help. Call or text us at (209) 373-2824 for more information. Our Certified Enrollment Counselors (CECs) will work with you and your family to help you enroll in the health plan that best fits your needs. Our team can also help you find community-based resources, including housing, transportation, food, and more. If you have questions, or would like to set up an appointment, call or text us at (209) 373-2824.
